findings.description: Hints for section s2 (仕様) are missing several attribute names that appear in the attribute table: `example`, `dataFrom`, `comment`, `id`.
findings.source_evidence: The source attribute table lists: id, domain, readonly, disabled, maxlength, example, cssClass, nameAlias, sample, dataFrom, comment, initialValueDesc. The s2 hints cover domain, readonly, disabled, maxlength, sample, nameAlias, cssClass, initialValueDesc — but omit example, dataFrom, comment, and id.
